---
title: "Media"
lang: en
---

## Overview

This page gathers public mentions, articles, videos, competitions, and professional links related to my work.

---

## Videos

### Cogito 2016 - *Animal habits and cloud formation*

<div style="aspect-ratio:16/9;">
  <iframe width="100%" height="100%" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/k96TG-NBua4" title="Cogito 2016 - Episode 1" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

_Source:_ Cogito series (Canal Savoir / AELIÉS, 2016).

### Co-operators Innovation Space presentation

<div style="aspect-ratio:16/9;">
  <iframe width="100%" height="100%" src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dvhPPcdSVDM" title="Co-operators Innovation Space presentation" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>


### SAS Global Forum 2016 - Student Symposium

Official recap (SAS Blog) with archive resources and videos.
→ <https://www.fsg.ulaval.ca/faculte/actualites/mm-nicosia-et-perreault-grands-vainqueurs-du-symposium-etudiant-du-sas-global-forum-2016-1812>

---

## Press & news (selection)

- **ULaval News** - *Le GPT-CDA, un robot conversationnel qui épaule les étudiantes et étudiants dans les cours de mathématiques et de statistique* (May 22, 2026).
  Article: <https://nouvelles.ulaval.ca/2026/05/22/le-gpt-cda-un-robot-conversationnel-qui-epaule-les-etudiantes-et-etudiants-dans-les-cours-de-mathematiques-et-de-statistique-66c35c61-4649-41a0-befb-c2f79036ac30>

- **SSC 2026** - 2026 New Investigator Presentation Award for a presentation on LOO-LBFP.
  Presentation: <https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ssc-2026-loo-lbfp-presentation/raw/main/main-beamer.pdf>

- **MT180 (Faculty of Science and Engineering, Université Laval)** - *Jury favorite* (March 7, 2016).

- **ActuLab (Université Laval - Actuarial Science)** - Event poster (2016), including the presentation *"Can you predict my golf score?"*.

---

## Competitions

- **SAS Global Forum - Student Symposium (2016)**
  Proceedings recap from SAS GF 2016, program and papers.

- **ActuLab (2015)** - *"Can you predict my golf score?"* (winning problem).
  Explanatory WordPress post: "How to predict your golf score like a pro?"

---

## Community & contests

### Shiny App Store - Shiny Contest (Posit Community, 2021)

"App Store" prototype for Shiny applications, co-developed by **Penelope Ferron** and **Aurélien Nicosia** (May 12, 2021).
→ Discussion (Posit Community): <https://forum.posit.co/t/shiny-app-store-shiny-contest-submission/104579>

---

## Blog & personal website

- **WordPress (blog / portfolio)** - Posts on SAS GF, Cogito, Shiny apps, publications, etc.
  Home page: <https://aureliennicosia.wordpress.com/>
  Shiny page (demo related to the Student Symposium): <https://aureliennicosia.wordpress.com/shiny-app/>
  Post: "How to predict your golf score like a pro?" (ActuLab, 2015).

---

## Professional presence

- **ResearchGate** - Public profile (publications, reads, citations).
  <https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Aurelien-Nicosia-2>

## EIOM - Interdisciplinary School of Tools & Methods (LinkedIn mention)

- **EIOM (Université Laval)** - LinkedIn post (5th edition, 2025).
  Link: <https://www.linkedin.com/posts/eiomulaval_jour-2-de-leiom-2025-5e-%C3%A9dition-activity-7366140743142240256-d4O_>
